summary: Phase 2 backend retest after HIGH-priority fix (seeded program_categories/app_settings missing `id`). Fix VERIFIED. All 4 seeded categories (foundation, subscription, advanced, special) now carry UUID `id`, are fetchable via GET /api/categories/{id}, and can be referenced as `category_id` in POST /api/programs/admin. All 9 seeded app_settings also carry UUID `id` (0 legacy rows without id in either collection). Backfill loop confirmed working. Added 2 targeted regression assertions to test_phase2.py (test_seeded_categories_have_uuid_id_and_fetchable + test_seeded_app_settings_have_uuid_id). Full regression: pytest /app/backend/tests/ → 80/80 passed (33 Phase 1 + 47 Phase 2). re.escape() in BaseRepository.search does not break existing search — TestPrograms::test_search_filter_sort passed. Backend startup log clean (no import/syntax errors on current code). Direct Mongo verification: db.program_categories missing `id` count = 0; db.app_settings missing `id` count = 0.

minor.issue: No GET-single-key helper for system config beyond paginated GET (parity with app_settings). Non-blocking.
Doc references PUT; code implements POST. Align doc or verb. Non-blocking.
Returns full unmasked account_number to the owning user (masking only on admin list). Deliberate but flagged as PII surface.
For broadcast rows, one user marking read flips is_read/read_at globally. Needs per-user read state (notification_reads collection) for phase 3.
No status filter — a revoked cert is still visible on direct GET (list /me correctly filters status='issued').
Resets verification_status=pending on ANY PUT (even unchanged payloads). UX polish.
write_activity helper is not wired into any route yet — user list will be empty until callers are added.

action_items: None blocking. Optional polish items listed under backend_issues.minor (per-user notification read state for phase 3, GET /settings/system/{key} parity, bank-details verify verb alignment).
Consider adding CORS allow_origins whitelist (not `*`) since allow_credentials=True — carried over from Phase 1 report.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix confirmed clean: seed_program_categories and seed_app_settings now include `id: str(uuid.uuid4())` in $setOnInsert plus an idempotent backfill loop for legacy rows lacking `id`. Verified in Mongo: 0 rows missing `id`.
re.escape() applied on BaseRepository.list_paginated search — safe against ReDoS/regex-injection. Verified existing search test still finds 'Inner Peace'.
Progress route now uses top-level `import uuid` — cleaner. referral_tree/profiles cleaned up inline __import__ hacks. models/phase2.py unused `date` import removed. All noted improvements landed.
Still recommend a small `_seed_upsert(collection, key_field, doc)` helper (already noted in prior report) to keep seed logic DRY and always inject id + created_by/updated_by.
Server-side deny-list for access tokens still absent (only refresh tokens revocable). Consider version/nonce claim if step-up security needed.

success_rate.backend: 100% (80/80: 33 Phase 1 + 47 Phase 2 including 2 new regression assertions)

test_credentials: Admin 9999999999 / Admin@12345. Dev OTP 123456. Company referral RW000000. Public base URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with 'TEST_'. Records created via API with random slugs/invoices/certificate numbers/mobiles. No teardown — soft-deleted / orphaned TEST_ rows remain but do not interfere.
context_for_next_testing_agent: HIGH-priority seed-id bug is fixed and verified. Two new pytest tests in test_phase2.py::TestCategories cover the regression. Full suite green (80/80). Command: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Minor issues in backend_issues.minor are non-blocking; treat as backlog polish for Phase 3.
rca of the issue: Original bug (iteration 2, HIGH): seed_program_categories inserted docs via $setOnInsert without generating an `id` field, making seeded categories un-referenceable as FK targets and un-fetchable via GET /categories/{id}. Fix applied by main agent: added `id: str(uuid.uuid4())` in $setOnInsert of both seed_program_categories and seed_app_settings; also added an idempotent backfill loop (async for legacy in db.<coll>.find({'id':{'$exists':False}}): update_one({_id}, {$set:{id: uuid.uuid4()}})) so pre-existing deployments self-heal on next startup. Verified in Mongo: 0 program_categories or app_settings rows lack `id`; foundation/subscription/advanced/special all fetchable by id; POST /programs/admin succeeds with a seeded category_id.
